heading: Notification of changes to Uniform Code of Military Justice or Manual for Courts Martial relating to covered misconduct1So in original. Probably should be followed by a hyphen.1
label: 2536 Notification of changes to Uniform Code of Military Justice or Manual for Courts Martial relating to covered misconduct1So in original. Probably should be followed by a hyphen.1

children.label: A
children.text: to add any sex-related offense as a new article; or

children.text: to remove an article relating to covered misconduct described in any of paragraphs (1) through (7) of section 301.2So in original. Probably should be “”.2section 2539 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: to add any sex-related offense as an offense described under an article of the Uniform Code of Military Justice; or
